name: @pryzm/sync-client
description: PRYZM 2 — client-side sync skeleton (S43 D1-D2). SyncClient (Yjs document + WebSocketProvider transport), EventBridge (the strategic ADR-002 Immer ⇄ Y.Doc translator at the client; forward = local commit → Y.Map.set, reverse = Y.Map.observe → CommandBus.applyPatchOnly with non-broadcast invariant), and PryzmAwareness (S44 land; type-only skeleton in S43 so soft-locks (S45) can take a stable type-side dependency on heldLocks). Implements code-level ADR-0033.
